description_long: This object is a pair of modern self-service ticket vending machines, commonly found at train stations or transit stops in Germany. Each unit features a prominent yellow and white color scheme with black accents, and the word 'Fahrkarten' (German for 'tickets') is clearly displayed at the top. The front panels are equipped with large display screens, various buttons, a card reader, and a cash slot, allowing users to purchase tickets for regional and local transportation. The machines are constructed from sturdy metal with a matte finish, and the lower section is reinforced with a concrete or metal base for stability. Branding and instructional signage are visible on the front and sides, including the 'bwegt' logo and pictograms for user guidance. The overall design is robust, weather-resistant, and intended for high-traffic public environments.
description: A pair of robust, yellow-and-white self-service ticket vending machines with display screens, payment interfaces, and clear signage for public transit use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile of both machines, with visible signage and black top covers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the interactive panels, large display screens, payment slots, and prominent 'Fahrkarten' signage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the information icons and additional signage, with less detail on interactive components.
description_view_3: Rear or angled view showing the back and side panels, branding, and the sturdy base of both machines.
attribute_display_screen: Each machine has a large rectangular display screen on the front, oriented vertically, with a black bezel and visible interface elements for ticket selection.
attribute_payment_interface: Front panels include a card reader, NFC tap area, keypad, and cash slot, all located below or beside the display screen and clearly marked.
attribute_branding_or_logo: The 'bwegt' logo and the word 'Fahrkarten' are printed in black and yellow on the upper front and side panels, with additional pictograms and icons for information.
attribute_instructional_signage: Instructional signage includes printed text, icons, and pictograms on the front and sides, providing guidance for ticket purchase and machine use.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A small horizontal slot below the display screen on each machine serves as the receipt dispenser, easily accessible to users.
